name: CenterCalculus
summary: Class to calculate the center of an object

methods.summary: Calculates the center of a Line2D

params.name: line
params.doc: Line2D on which to calculate the center

methods.summary: Calculates the center of a Line3D
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a Line3D

params.name: line
params.doc: line on which to calculate the center

methods.name: Calculate(polyline, edge)
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a Polyline2D = 0 whole geo, > 0 concrete edge
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a Polyline2D = 0 whole geo, > 0 concrete edge

params.name: polyline
params.doc: Polyline on which to calculate the center

params.name: edge
params.doc: calculate the center on edge
0 whole geo, > 0 concrete edge

params.name: edge

methods.name: Calculate(polygon, bPlaneCenter, edge)
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a Polygon2D = 0 whole geo, > 0 concrete edge
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a Polygon2D = 0 whole geo, > 0 concrete edge

params.name: polygon
params.doc: Polygon on which to calculate the center

params.name: bPlaneCenter
params.doc: To distinguish between the center of the area and on the line.

params.name: edge
params.doc: calculate the center on edge of first component
0 whole geo, > 0 concrete edge

methods.name: Calculate(path, eps, bAreaCenter)
methods.summary: Calculates the center of a Path2D
methods.remarks: Calculates the center of a Path2D

params.name: path
params.doc: Path on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps

methods.name: Calculate(path, eps, bAreaCenter)

params.name: path
params.doc: Path on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for splines and clothoids

params.name: bAreaCenter
params.doc: True if path is boundary of area and you want to 'gravity' point, false for center on boundary.

params.name: geoObject
params.doc: object on which to calculate the center

params.name: eps
params.doc: Precision for splines and clothoids

params.name: bArcCenter
params.doc: For arcs to distinguish between the center inside the arc and on the arc.

params.name: edge
params.doc: For polyline and polygon to calculate the center on edge
0 whole geo, > 0 concrete edge
